title: Craftable Bundles
description: Adding a crafting recipe for bundles using leather!
body:
All this data pack does is add a crafting recipe for bundles in 1.20 and might work for older versions. I'm making this because 1.21 is going to have them. So this basically is a backport. The recipe uses leather instead of rabbit hide though, since rabbits are somewhat annoying to find and harvest. The crafting recipe is in the gallery.



How Do I Enable This For A Singleplayer World?

-For a single player world, all you have to do is when making your world go to:

MORE > DATAPACKS > OPEN PACK FOLDER > then just drag the BundleCraft pack in and enable it. It's that simple!



How Do I Enable This For My Server?

-For a server it is a little different and involving you having access to your server files. You need to access the "world" folder, but it can also be called "server" too. Here is how you do it:

Go to your files > open the world/server folder > open the datapacks folder > add the BundleCraft datapack > save > and you're done!
